# Polar MCP
Unofficial local-first Polar AccessLink Dynamic API v4 MCP server for AI training, recovery, PPI, Nightly Recharge and orthostatic test agents.
Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/polarmcp
Homepage: https://wellness.delx.ai/connectors/polar
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/polar-mcp-unofficial
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=polar-mcp-unofficial -- polar-mcp-server doctor
MCP command: polar-mcp-server

- MCP registry name: io.github.davidmosiah/polarmcp
- Start agents with polar_connection_status and polar_data_inventory before any data tool.
- Read-only default tools: polar_agent_manifest, polar_capabilities, polar_privacy_audit, polar_connection_status, polar_data_inventory, polar_daily_summary, polar_weekly_summary, polar_cache_status.
- OAuth env: POLAR_CLIENT_ID, POLAR_CLIENT_SECRET, POLAR_REDIRECT_URI.
- Optional env: POLAR_TOKEN_PATH (token storage path), POLAR_PRIVACY_MODE (summary|structured|raw, default structured), POLAR_CACHE (true|sqlite to enable), POLAR_CACHE_PATH.
- Prefer JSON responses for automation and markdown responses for human summaries.
- Tokens stay local under ~/.polarmcp/tokens.json (or equivalent) and should never be printed.
- Not medical advice. Use as trend context only — outputs are operational context, not medical, legal or financial advice.
